name: load_csv
description: Loads a CSV dataset into memory as a pandas DataFrame. This tool should always be called before performing any analysis, visualization, or data manipulation. It reads the dataset, stores it as the global DataFrame, and returns a summary including the dataset shape, column names, and a preview of the first five rows.

path.description: Path to the CSV file to be loaded.

returns.description: Summary of the loaded dataset including shape, column names, and first five rows.

name: analyze_data
description: Performs automatic exploratory data analysis (EDA) on the currently loaded dataset. Computes descriptive statistics, missing values, duplicate rows, unique values, data types, and the correlation matrix for all numeric columns. Use this tool whenever the user asks for dataset overview, summary, statistics, quality checks, or exploratory analysis.

returns.description: Comprehensive textual report describing the dataset.

name: run_pandas_code
description: Executes custom Python pandas code on the loaded DataFrame. The DataFrame is available as 'df'. This tool should be used whenever the requested analysis cannot be answered directly using the predefined tools. Suitable for filtering, grouping, aggregation, sorting, feature engineering, statistical calculations, joins, transformations, and any custom pandas operations.

code.description: Python pandas code to execute. Use the variable 'df' to access the dataset. Use print() for any output that should be returned.

returns.description: Console output generated by the executed code or an error message if execution fails.

name: plot_chart
description: Generates professional-quality visualizations from the loaded dataset. Supported chart types include bar chart, line chart, scatter plot, histogram, pie chart, box plot, violin plot, heatmap, count plot, and other statistical visualizations as implemented. The generated plots automatically include descriptive titles, axis labels, legends when appropriate, grids, high-resolution output, and optimized layout.

x.description: Column to be used for the x-axis.

y.description: Column to be used for the y-axis. Not required for histogram or count plots.

title.description: Optional custom title for the chart.

xlabel.description: Optional custom label for the x-axis.

ylabel.description: Optional custom label for the y-axis.

returns.description: File path of the generated chart image.
